# Age Verification Credential

<div align="center">
 
[![A-SIT Plus Official](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/a-sit-plus/a-sit-plus.github.io/709e802b3e00cb57916cbb254ca5e1a5756ad2a8/A-SIT%20Plus_%20official_opt.svg)](https://plus.a-sit.at/open-source.html)
[![Powered by VC-K](https://img.shields.io/badge/VC--K-powered-8A2BE2?logo=data%3Aimage%2Fsvg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%&logoColor=white&labelColor=white)](https://github.com/a-sit-plus/vck)
[![GitHub license](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-Apache%20License%202.0-brightgreen.svg?style=flat)](http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)
[![Kotlin](https://img.shields.io/badge/kotlin-multiplatform--mobile-orange.svg?logo=kotlin)](http://kotlinlang.org)
[![Kotlin](https://img.shields.io/badge/kotlin-2.2.21-blue.svg?logo=kotlin)](http://kotlinlang.org)
[![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/java-17-blue.svg?logo=OPENJDK)](https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/downloads/#java17)
[![Maven Central](https://img.shields.io/maven-central/v/at.asitplus.wallet/ageverification)](https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/at.asitplus.wallet/ageverification/)

</div>

Manage an [age verification](https://ageverification.dev/Technical%20Specification/annexes/annex-A/annex-A-av-profile) credential as a ISO 18013-5 credential, with the help of [VC-K](https://github.com/a-sit-plus/vck).

Be sure to call `at.asitplus.wallet.ageverification.Initializer.initWithVCK()` first thing in your application.

These attributes are implemented:
- `age_over_12`
- `age_over_13`
- `age_over_14`
- `age_over_16`
- `age_over_18`
- `age_over_21`
- `age_over_25`
- `age_over_60`
- `age_over_62`
- `age_over_65`
- `age_over_68`

Doctype and namespace is `eu.europa.ec.av.1`.

Please note that we did not implement zero-knowledge proofs.

## Changelog

Release 1.0.0:
 - Initial release, based on specification per November 2025
